'''zhawanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noceffector|noceffector]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noceffector|noceffector]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhawanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæwængæth|zhæwængæth]] || [[word:zhæwængæj|zhæwængæj]] || [[word:zhæwængæsh|zhæwængæsh]] || [[word:zhæwængæ|zhæwængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawawangath|zhawawangath]] || [[word:zhawawangaj|zhawawangaj]] || [[word:zhawawangash|zhawawangash]] || [[word:zhawawanga|zhawawanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawangath|zhawangath]] || [[word:zhawangaj|zhawangaj]] || [[word:zhawangash|zhawangash]] || [[word:zhawanga|zhawanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawafngath|zhawafngath]] || [[word:zhawafngaj|zhawafngaj]] || [[word:zhawafngash|zhawafngash]] || [[word:zhawafngaf|zhawafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhawangatha|zhawangatha]] || [[word:zhawangaja|zhawangaja]] || [[word:zhawangasha|zhawangasha]] || [[word:zhawangaka|zhawangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhawangath|zhawangath]] || [[word:zhawangaj|zhawangaj]] || [[word:zhawangash|zhawangash]] || [[word:zhawanga|zhawanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhawangathal|zhawangathal]] || [[word:zhawangajal|zhawangajal]] || [[word:zhawangashal|zhawangashal]] || [[word:zhawangakal|zhawangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhawangathatha|zhawangathatha]] || [[word:zhawangajaja|zhawangajaja]] || [[word:zhawangashasha|zhawangashasha]] || [[word:zhawangaka|zhawangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhawangathan|zhawangathan]] || [[word:zhawangajan|zhawangajan]] || [[word:zhawangashan|zhawangashan]] || [[word:zhawangakan|zhawangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhawangathaoro|zhawangathaoro]] || [[word:zhawangajaoro|zhawangajaoro]] || [[word:zhawangashaoro|zhawangashaoro]] || [[word:zhawangakaoro|zhawangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
